pronouns.title: Personal Pronouns – I, He, She, They
pronouns.description: Identify and use personal pronouns in sentences

pronouns.title: Personal Pronouns – Practice B
pronouns.description: More practice replacing nouns with pronouns

pronouns.title: Subject Pronouns
pronouns.description: Practice using subject pronouns: I, you, he, she, it, we, they

pronouns.title: Object Pronouns
pronouns.description: Practice using object pronouns: me, him, her, us, them

pronouns.title: Possessive Pronouns
pronouns.description: Practice possessive pronouns: mine, yours, his, hers, ours, theirs

pronouns.title: Pronoun Agreement
pronouns.description: Match pronouns correctly to the nouns they replace

contractions.title: Contractions with 'not'
contractions.description: Form contractions using apostrophes (isn't, don't, can't)

contractions.title: Contractions Practice B
contractions.description: Expand contractions back into two words

contractions.title: Contractions with 'will' and 'am'
contractions.description: Form contractions with will (I'll, you'll) and am (I'm)

homophones.title: Homophones – Set 1
homophones.description: Choose the correct homophone to complete each sentence

homophones.title: Homophones – Set 2
homophones.description: Practice with homophones: see/sea, to/too/two, know/no

interjections.title: Interjections – Identify and Use
interjections.description: Identify interjections and learn to use them in writing

interjections.title: Interjections in Sentences
interjections.description: Add appropriate interjections to sentences (Wow! Ouch! Yay!)

suffix_prefix.title: Common Prefixes (un-, re-, pre-)
suffix_prefix.description: Identify and use common prefixes to change word meanings

suffix_prefix.title: Common Suffixes (-ful, -less, -er)
suffix_prefix.description: Add suffixes to base words and understand new meanings

suffix_prefix.title: Prefixes Practice B
suffix_prefix.description: More prefix practice: dis-, mis-, over-

vocabulary.title: Words ending in -tion and -sion
vocabulary.description: Spell and use words ending in -tion (action, nation, station)

vocabulary.title: Silent letters – gh words
vocabulary.description: Practice words with silent gh: rough, cough, enough, through

vocabulary.title: Special Spelling Patterns – que words
vocabulary.description: Practice words ending in -que (opaque, unique, antique)

research_writing.title: Reading Comprehension – Grade 2 Passage A
research_writing.description: Read a short passage and answer comprehension questions

research_writing.title: Reading Comprehension – Grade 2 Passage B
research_writing.description: Read a passage, make predictions and summarise

research_writing.title: Writing with Purpose – Facts and Opinions
research_writing.description: Distinguish facts from opinions in sentences

division_equal_groups.title: Division – Equal Groups A
division_equal_groups.description: Share objects into equal groups to understand division

division_equal_groups.title: Division – Equal Groups B
division_equal_groups.description: Draw groups and write division sentences

division_equal_groups.title: Dividing into Equal Groups
division_equal_groups.description: Visual division problems using equal group drawings

division_repeated_subtraction.title: Division by Repeated Subtraction A
division_repeated_subtraction.description: Use repeated subtraction to solve division problems

division_repeated_subtraction.title: Division by Repeated Subtraction B
division_repeated_subtraction.description: Subtract repeatedly and count steps to find the quotient

division_number_line.title: Division on a Number Line A
division_number_line.description: Use number lines to solve division problems by making equal jumps

division_number_line.title: Division on a Number Line B
division_number_line.description: Jump back on a number line to show division

division_fact_families.title: Multiplication and Division Fact Families A
division_fact_families.description: Complete fact family triangles linking multiplication and division

division_fact_families.title: Fact Families – Multiplication and Division B
division_fact_families.description: Write all 4 facts in a fact family

division_fact_families.title: Related Multiplication and Division Facts
division_fact_families.description: See how multiplication facts help solve division problems

division_word_problems.title: Division Word Problems A
division_word_problems.description: Solve real-life division story problems (sharing equally)

division_word_problems.title: Division Word Problems B
division_word_problems.description: Division word problems with grouping and sharing contexts

measurement_length.title: Measuring Length in Centimetres
measurement_length.description: Measure and compare objects using a ruler in centimetres

measurement_length.title: Measuring Length in Inches
measurement_length.description: Measure objects using a ruler in inches

measurement_length.title: Estimating and Measuring Length
measurement_length.description: Estimate then measure lengths of everyday objects

measurement_mass.title: Measuring Mass in Grams and Kilograms
measurement_mass.description: Read scales and compare objects by mass

measurement_mass.title: Comparing Weights
measurement_mass.description: Use balance scales to compare objects lighter/heavier

measurement_capacity.title: Measuring Capacity in Litres
measurement_capacity.description: Read measuring jugs and understand litres and millilitres

measurement_capacity.title: Comparing Capacity
measurement_capacity.description: Compare containers and order by capacity
